name: Senkron Guvenlik ve Iletisim Sistemleri A.S.
summary: Senkron G√É¬ºvenlik ve Iletisim Sistemleri A.S. operates as an electronic security systems integrator in Turkey and internationally. It offers closed circuit television systems, video management software, access control systems, intrusion alarm systems, fire detection systems, emergency exit and fire escape direction units, fire extinguishing systems, perimeter security systems, video intercom systems, parking lot safety barriers, road blockers, and high speed doors. The company also provides metal gate and hand detectors, X-ray control devices, explosive and narcotic detection systems, turnstile and full length high security cabinets, public address and voice evacuation systems, electronic article surveillance systems, and artworks wireless security systems, as well as licenses plate recognition, RFID, fast toll collection, and under vehicle surveillance systems. In addition, it offers telepresence systems, guard tour control systems, bullet proof glass and safety window films, security token and asset management systems, and building automation systems. Further, the company provides project consultation, integration, aftersales technical service and maintenance, and alarm monitoring services. It serves banking and finance, and private and public institutions. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
